ham.subject: Bank Alert: Recent Transaction
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We wish to inform you that a transaction has been made on your account:

- Amount: $1,200.00
- Date: 15 April 2026
- Merchant: XYZ Electronics
- Transaction ID: 1234567890

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact your bank immediately.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Your Bank

spam.subject: Urgent: Microsoft 365 Password Expiration Notice
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is an automated notification from Microsoft 365. Your account password will expire in 3 days. Please update your password immediately to avoid service disruption. Failure to do so will result in account lockout.

Click here to reset your password: <URL>

If you did not request this change, please ignore this message.

Thank you.

Best regards,
Microsoft Support
